title: Rolson 46889 8 pc Boxed Spanner Set with T-Bar
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. To date, we have over 250 new exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and point-of-sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal!. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines. We bring promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Description Drop forged heat treated steel . Bright plated . Suppliedwith T-bar handle . Supplied with vinyl pouch . Sizes: 6x7, 8x9, 10x11, 12x13, 14x15, 15x17, 18x19, 20x22
